problemSolution.title: Your best content deserves
problemSolution.description: Platforms analyze the digital fingerprint of every file. DuupFlow makes your copies technically undetectable.
problemSolution.problemText: Platforms detect every duplicate — even renamed, even recompressed. Result: silent shadowban from the 2nd post.
problemSolution.problemHighlight: 1 file = 1 single post. After that, guaranteed shadowban.
problemSolution.solutionText: DuupFlow regenerates the fingerprint of each copy — unique metadata, video re-encoding, invisible micro-variations. Technically new every time.
problemSolution.solutionHighlight: Scale the same content endlessly. Without ever being detected.
problemSolution.resultText: one great piece of content -> {count} unique posts -> {count} chances to beat the algorithm.
problemSolution.psStat2Cap: Silent shadowban from the 2nd post of a duplicate

featuresScroller.subtitle: All the tools you need to scale your content production.
featuresScroller.card1Desc: Duplicate your images and videos in bulk. Each copy is unique — metadata, technical fingerprint, hash. Undetectable by platforms.
featuresScroller.card2Desc: Modify the digital fingerprint without touching the visuals. Magic Pixel changes the hash of each file while keeping the content visually identical.
featuresScroller.card3Desc: Localize your content and inject authentic iPhone metadata. The algorithm thinks your content comes from a real device.
featuresScroller.cardVariationIADesc: Generate 1 to 3 AI variations of your image. Same features, same decor, same lighting — only a subtle movement changes. Perfect for Instagram carousels.
featuresScroller.card4Desc: Erase the AI signature from your content. Replace Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion metadata with a realistic human identity.

howItWorks.title: Up and running
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, fast, no learning curve.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag and drop your image or video into DuupFlow. JPG, PNG, WEBP, MP4, MOV, MKV — all formats accepted, including batch uploads.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose the number of copies and options (visual, semi-visual, metadata). DuupFlow modifies each file to make it unique to detection algorithms.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Export your content as ZIP or one by one. Each file is ready to publish on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Twitter/X or any platform.

avantages.subtitle: Every post unique. Every file undetectable.
avantages.card1Desc: Duplicate dozens of files in seconds. Each copy is unique.
avantages.card5Desc: AI signatures erased. Human identity injected.
avantages.card6Desc: 1 image -> 3 subtle variations. Identity and decor preserved.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have more questions? Contact us by email or via the built-in chat.
faq.q1: How does DuupFlow make each copy unique?
faq.a1: DuupFlow modifies metadata (EXIF, XMP, QuickTime), technical parameters (bitrate, GOP, FPS), and can add imperceptible noise via Magic Pixel. Each copy has a unique hash — platforms see a different file.
faq.a2: It's a feature that injects authentic Apple metadata into your files: iPhone model, iOS version, camera, GPS, signature. Platforms think the content comes from a real iPhone, improving how algorithms handle it.
faq.a3: Magic Pixel adds imperceptible luma noise to each pixel. Visually identical, but the file hash is completely different. Duplicate detection algorithms cannot link the original and the copy.
faq.a4: Yes. DuupFlow preserves the original resolution — 1080p stays 1080p, 4K stays 4K. No downscaling, no quality loss.
faq.q5: Can DuupFlow mask the AI signature?
faq.a5: Yes. The AI Detection module erases all AI metadata (EXIF, XMP, IPTC, C2PA, JUMBF) and replaces it with a realistic human identity — camera, software, photographer, date.
faq.q6: How many copies can I generate?
faq.a6: The number depends on your subscription. All plans allow mass duplication with unlimited copies per file.
faq.a7: Images: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Videos: MP4, MOV, MKV, AVI, WebM. MOV format is automatically used with Algorithm Priority to simulate a real iPhone.
faq.a8: You upload an image and the AI generates 1 to 3 variations while keeping the identity, outfit, decor and lighting strictly intact. Only a subtle motion changes (a gesture, a gaze, a pose). It's a pay-per-use module: €0.70 per image on the Pro plan, €0.90 on Solo, €1.10 on Free.

footer.tagline: DuupFlow duplicates your images and videos in seconds. Each file becomes unique in the eyes of platform algorithms. Built for agencies and creators scaling their social content.

announce.text: New — Stay eligible on TikTok: the anti-detection solution is in DuupFlow.

tarifs.enterpriseFeature1: Everything in the Pro plan, no limits
tarifs.testimonial1: DuupFlow saved us hours. We reuse our best content without ever being penalized by the algorithms.
tarifs.testimonial2: DuupFlow does it in seconds and the results are unmatched. My reach has exploded since I started using it.
tarifs.testimonial3: I check every copy before publishing with the Comparator. My engagement rate doubled in a month.
tarifs.testimonial4: 50 copies of the same Reel, each one unique. TikTok never detected it. This is exactly what we needed.
tarifs.testimonial5: Our organic reach has exploded. We post the same content on 6 platforms without any algorithmic penalty.
tarifs.testimonial6: Our CAC dropped 30% since we started scaling with DuupFlow. Automatic duplication of top content is genius.
tarifs.testimonial7: Before DuupFlow, every post required a new creation. Now we reuse our top performers endlessly.
tarifs.testimonial8: The AI Detection module is perfect. I publish AI-generated content without any detectable markers.
tarifs.testimonial9: DuupFlow handles 3 clients simultaneously. We generate 100+ copies per week with zero extra effort.
tarifs.testimonial10: What I love about DuupFlow is the simplicity. Upload, duplicate, download. 30 seconds flat.
tarifs.testimonial11: My impression rate on TikTok tripled in 2 weeks after I started using DuupFlow.
tarifs.testimonial12: DuupFlow has become our #1 tool. Not a single penalty in 4 months of intensive use.
tarifs.faqSubtitle: Have more questions? Contact us by email.
tarifs.pricingFaq1Q: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
tarifs.pricingFaq1A: Yes, absolutely. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings, with no notice or extra fees. Access remains active until the end of the current billing period.
tarifs.pricingFaq2Q: Does the Pro plan include all DuupFlow modules?
tarifs.pricingFaq2A: Yes. The Pro plan gives you access to all modules: Image Duplication, Video Duplication, Similarity Comparator, and AI Detection. All formats are supported and copies are unlimited.
tarifs.pricingFaq3Q: How many files can I process per month with the Pro plan?
tarifs.pricingFaq3A: There is no limit on the number of files or copies generated. You can import as many files as you want and create as many variants as needed, with no monthly restriction.
tarifs.pricingFaq4A: Algorithm Priority injects authentic Apple metadata into your files — iPhone model, iOS version, camera lens, GPS coordinates. Platform algorithms treat your content as if it came from a real device, boosting your organic reach.
tarifs.pricingFaq5A: Magic Pixel adds imperceptible noise to every pixel of every frame. The result is visually identical to the original, but the file hash is completely different. Duplicate detection algorithms see a unique file with every copy.
tarifs.pricingFaq6A: Billing is monthly and automatic. You receive an invoice by email at each renewal. We accept Visa, Mastercard and American Express through our partner Stripe.
tarifs.pricingFaq7Q: What is the difference between the Pro and Enterprise plans?
tarifs.pricingFaq7A: The Pro plan is designed for creators and small agencies — full access, unlimited copies, priority support. The Enterprise plan adds API access, a dedicated account manager, a custom SLA, and tailored onboarding for larger teams.
tarifs.pricingFaq8Q: How is AI Variation billing handled?
tarifs.pricingFaq8A: AI Variation is billed pay-per-use via a token system (1 token = €0.40). The price per image depends on your plan: €1.10 on Free, €0.90 on Solo, €0.70 on Pro. You top up whenever you want, no commitment. If a generation fails (NSFW, technical error), your tokens are refunded automatically.

aiLab.title: AI Variation
aiLab.subtitle: Generate 1 to 3 variations of an image. Identity, decor and lighting preserved — only the action changes.

aiLab.promptPlaceholder: E.g.: change the background to a sunset beach…

aiLab.errPromptRequired: You must write a prompt in custom mode.
aiLab.modalSection1Body: You upload an image. The AI generates 1 to 3 variants while keeping the identity, outfit, decor and lighting intact. Only a small motion changes (arms, gaze, posture, gestures).
aiLab.modalSection2Step1: Drop an image in the left area
aiLab.modalSection2Step2: Choose the number of variations (1, 2 or 3)
aiLab.modalSection2Step4: Download the ones you want, delete the rest
aiLab.modalSection3Pure: Pure variation — the AI picks a motion from a predefined list (hands in hair, gaze, posture…).
aiLab.modalSection3Prompt: With prompt — you write what you want to change. The more concrete, the better.
aiLab.modalSection4Tip2: Avoid very dark, blurry or heavily compressed images
aiLab.modalSection4Tip3: Frontal or 3/4 portraits work better than extreme angles
aiLab.modalSection4Tip4: The sharper the subject, the better the face is preserved

videos.title: Video Duplication
videos.subtitle: Choose your workflow.
videos.simpleDesc: Fast and efficient — ideal for mass duplication with no configuration.
videos.advancedDesc: Full control — configure each filter manually with templates.

durationInfo.title: Why duration varies
durationInfo.body: The longer and higher-quality your files are, the longer duplications take to generate. This is completely normal: DuupFlow works hard to preserve the original quality of your files.

videosCommon.errorGeneric: Something went wrong during duplication. Retry with the missing files.
videosCommon.durationExceeded: The video "{name}" exceeds {max} seconds ({dur}s). Maximum allowed duration: {max} s. Please trim the video before continuing.
videosCommon.canLeaveBody: The duplication keeps running in the background. Your videos will be in your library.
videosCommon.interruptedBody: It's not your fault — the connection dropped. Your duplication keeps running on our servers; the copies already finished are downloadable below.

videosSimple.title: Video Duplication — Simple
videosSimple.iphoneMetaHint: Simulates a video from a real iPhone by injecting authentic Apple metadata (device, iOS, camera, GPS, signature).

metadata.label: Metadata
metadata.help: Injects random metadata: date, editing software, brand container, unique identifier. No visual change.

metadata_technical.label: Technical metadata
metadata_technical.hint: video bitrate, GOP, fps, H.264 profile
metadata_technical.help: Video bitrate 3–22 Mb/s • GOP 30–500 • H.264 profile (baseline/main/high) • Random FPS.

pixel_magic.label: Magic pixel
pixel_magic.help: Adds imperceptible luma noise to every pixel, every frame. Changes the file hash with no visible change.

audio.label: Audio
audio.help: Volume ±2 dB • Small random EQ peak (100–8,000 Hz, +1.5 dB) • Audio bitrate 96–192 kb/s. Stays subtle.

motion.label: Motion
motion.help:
Tiny non-visual changes:
Zoom 1.01×–1.04× • Micro pan 0–10% • Speed ±1–3% (audio synced).
Imperceptible to the eye, enough to diversify the digital fingerprint.

visual.label: Visuals
visual.help:
Imperceptible variations:
Brightness ±3% • Contrast ±5% • Saturation ±5% • Gamma ±3% • Hue ±3° • Very soft unsharp.

videosAdvanced.title: Video Duplication — Advanced
videosAdvanced.iphoneMetaHint: Simulates an iPhone video with authentic Apple metadata (QuickTime, GPS, signature). Output is .mov.
videosAdvanced.mirrorHintBody: If your videos contain no text, also enable “Reverse (horizontal mirror)” under Options — it's one of the most effective effects against detection.

tiktokGuide.title: TikTok Guide
tiktokGuide.subtitle: How to maximise your odds of staying eligible — and what to check before blaming “non-original”.

tiktokAnnounce.title: Stay eligible on TikTok
tiktokAnnounce.lead: TikTok makes videos it deems “non-original” ineligible. DuupFlow answers with transformations that change what the algorithm sees — to maximise your chances of staying in the For You feed.
tiktokAnnounce.bullet3: Every copy genuinely different from the others
tiktokAnnounce.newsBody: SOFT/HARD templates + “Advanced motion” in advanced mode, to stay eligible on TikTok.
tiktokAnnounce.notifBody: The SOFT/HARD templates and “Advanced motion” are waiting for you in advanced mode.

aiDetection.title: AI Detection — Metadata
aiDetection.subtitle: Completely erases AI metadata (EXIF, XMP, IPTC, C2PA) and replaces it with a realistic human identity.
aiDetection.platformNoticeContent: This module removes all AI metadata — including C2PA manifests used by Meta/Threads.
aiDetection.howItWorksStep1: Complete removal — EXIF, XMP, IPTC, C2PA/JUMBF, all AI manifests erased.
aiDetection.howItWorksStep2: Pixel processing — subtle photo capture simulation.
aiDetection.howItWorksStep3: Human identity injection — realistic camera, software, photographer, consistent date.
aiDetection.maskSubtitle: Replaces all AI metadata with a realistic human identity — camera, software, photographer, date.
aiDetection.successMessage: {count} file(s) processed — metadata erased and rewritten.
aiDetection.limitError: Limit exceeded — you selected {count} files, the maximum is {max}. Only the first {max} were kept.

aiDetectionLock.title: AI Signatures
aiDetectionLock.headline: Available with Solo and Pro plans
aiDetectionLock.whatBody: The AI Signatures module strips all AI metadata (EXIF, XMP, IPTC, C2PA, JUMBF) from your files and replaces it with a realistic human identity — camera, software, photographer, date.
aiDetectionLock.useCaseBody: If you publish AI-generated images (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion…), platforms (Meta, Instagram, Threads) automatically detect AI signatures and throttle your reach. This module makes your content look like an authentic human file.
aiDetectionLock.bullet1: Works with Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Runway, Sora
aiDetectionLock.bullet2: Full removal of C2PA, JUMBF, EXIF, XMP, IPTC

settings.faq4Q: Why does the comparator show a score?
settings.faq4A: The lower the score, the more different your files appear to algorithms.
settings.faq5A: Social networks can identify AI-generated content through their metadata. Our tool replaces these revealing metadata.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Need help? Contact us through one of the channels below.
support.faq1Q: My duplication fails, what should I do?
support.faq1A: Make sure your video is under 59 seconds and in MP4, MOV, MKV or AVI format. If the issue persists, contact us on Telegram.
support.faq2A: It injects realistic iPhone metadata into your files so platforms think the content comes from a real device.
support.faq3Q: Which packs don't modify the visuals?
support.faq3A: The Metadata, Audio, Motion and Technical packs don't touch the visuals. Only the Visuals pack applies visible changes (very subtle).

videos.s1b: Simple keeps it quick and to the point. Advanced gives you full control. Pick what fits.

videosSimple.s1b: Drag a file or click to import. You can add several.
videosSimple.s2b: Set how many unique versions to generate.
videosSimple.s3b: Pick the packs and options you want, right before duplicating.
videosSimple.s4b: Click here and we handle the rest.

videosAdvanced.s1b: Here you get full control over the metadata. Drop your video to get started.
videosAdvanced.s2b: Expand the groups and tune the advanced settings as needed, right before duplicating.
videosAdvanced.s3b: Click here and we handle the rest.

similarity.s1b: Place the two files to compare in the zones provided.
similarity.s2b: We analyze both and give you a similarity score.

generate.s1b: Import the image you want to vary.
generate.s2b: Pure variation to stay faithful, or text guided to steer the result.
generate.s3b: The AI creates your variations in seconds.

aidetection.s1b: Drop your files and we replace the AI metadata with a realistic human identity.

onboarding.autoRedirect: Automatic redirect in a few seconds...
onboarding.platformsTitle: Which platforms will you publish on?

tour.actionRequired: Do the action to unlock Next
tour.clickToAdvance: Click the highlighted element to advance
tour.navigateBack: Go back to the page to continue
tour.offPageTitle: Your guide is waiting right here 👋
tour.offPageBody: You've left the current module's page. No worries, your progress is saved. When you want to resume, click the button below to jump back to the step.
tour.welcomeBody: We'll walk you through your very first duplication together. 4 modules to try, 2 minutes top. Follow the guide, do the actions, and you're set.
tour.navImagesBody: Click 'Images' in the sidebar to open the image duplication module.
tour.imgDropzoneBody: Click or drag-and-drop an image (JPG, PNG or HEIC). You can add several at once.
tour.imgCopiesBody: Pick how many copies to generate per image. One is enough to test, more if you want to scale reach.
tour.imgOptionsBody: Tick at least one filter (Fundamentals, Reverse, Visuals or Semi). The more you stack, the more each copy becomes unique.
tour.imgSubmitBody: Click 'Duplicate' to generate your copies. They'll be ready in seconds.
tour.imgSubmitDoneBody: Your images are being prepared! Download them and post on your platforms now. Take your time, then click Next when you're ready for the next module.
tour.navVideosBody: Now videos. Click 'Videos' in the sidebar to continue.
tour.videoModesBody: Simple Mode: quick duplication with predefined packs (metadata, audio, motion, etc.) — ideal to move fast. Advanced Mode: you control every parameter individually (rotation, dimensions, borders, etc.) and can save your own templates. For this tour, we'll take the Simple Mode.
tour.videoModesSimpleBody: Duplicate quickly with predefined packs: metadata, audio, motion, technical, visuals. Ideal to move fast and duplicate at scale without configuring each parameter.
tour.videoModesAdvancedBody: You control every parameter individually: rotation, dimensions, borders, bitrate, etc. You can save your settings as templates and reapply them later.
tour.videoModesFooter: For this tour, we'll take the Simple Mode — click Next.
tour.videoModeSimpleBody: Click 'Simple Mode' to access the video duplication form.
tour.videoDropzoneBody: Add a video (MP4, MOV, MKV or AVI). Max 59 seconds per file.
tour.videoPacksBody: Enable at least one pack — each pack adds a layer of invisible modifications to your copies.
tour.videoSubmitDoneBody: Your videos are being processed. Once ready, download and publish on your platforms. Click Next when you're ready for the next module.
tour.navSimBody: The comparator lets you check that your copies are actually different from the originals. Click 'Comparator'.
tour.simFile1Body: Add the original file in the first zone.
tour.simFile2Body: Add a copy in the second zone to compare it with the original.
tour.simSubmitBody: Click 'Compare' to analyse both files and see the similarity score.
tour.simSubmitDoneBody: Here's your similarity score. Lower means more unique copies. Review the details, then click Next.
tour.navGenBody: Last module: AI generation. Click 'AI Variation' in the sidebar.
tour.genDropzoneBody: Add an image that will serve as the base for the AI generation.
tour.genModeBody: Variation = inspired by your image. Prompt = guide generation with a description. Click on one of the two.
tour.genSubmitBody: Click 'Launch' so the AI generates your variants. You have 1 free token to try.
tour.genSubmitDoneBody: Your AI variants are being generated. Once ready, download or regenerate. Click Next when you're ready for the end of the tour.
tour.outroBody: You now know the 4 key modules of DuupFlow. Come back anytime from the sidebar — every feature is one click away.

chatbot.start: Hi! 👋 How can I help you?
chatbot.dupProblem: What kind of issue are you experiencing?
chatbot.dupError:
Try these steps:

1. Make sure your video is under 59 seconds
2. Check the format is MP4, MOV, MKV or AVI
3. Restart the duplication

If the issue persists, contact support.
chatbot.dupQuality:
The 'Metadata', 'Audio', 'Motion' and 'Technical' packs don't modify the visuals. Only the 'Visual' pack applies visible changes (very subtle).

If you see a yellow tint on an iPhone HDR video, that's normal — the system automatically converts HDR to SDR.
chatbot.dupSlow:
Speed depends on video length and number of copies. Tips:

• Reduce duration (max 59s)
• Run fewer copies at a time
• 'Motion' and 'Visual' packs are slower than 'Metadata' alone
chatbot.abo: What would you like to know about your subscription?
chatbot.aboChange: Go to 'Subscription' in the sidebar. You can see your current plan and modify it there.
chatbot.aboLimit: Each plan has a monthly duplication limit. If you've reached yours, you can upgrade from the 'Subscription' tab.
chatbot.howTo:
DuupFlow is simple:

1. Go to 'Images' or 'Videos'
2. Upload your file
3. Choose your packs/filters
4. Click 'Duplicate'
5. Download your copies

Each copy is unique (different metadata, pixels, hash).
chatbot.other: I can't answer all questions. Contact our support team directly!
chatbot.contact: Our team is available on Telegram for quick help.
chatbot.aiDetection: What would you like to know about AI Detection?
chatbot.aiWhat:
The AI Detection module erases all AI metadata from your files (EXIF, XMP, IPTC, C2PA) and replaces them with a realistic human identity.

Result: your AI-generated content appears as if created by a human with a real camera.
chatbot.aiVisual:
No visual modifications. Only metadata is changed. The pixels of your image/video remain identical.

To bypass visual detection by platforms, combine this module with Image Duplication (visual filters).
chatbot.aiPlatforms:
This module removes AI signatures detected by Meta, Instagram, Threads, and any platform using C2PA/JUMBF.

For maximum protection, combine with Duplication (metadata + visuals).
chatbot.newFeatures: Here are the latest DuupFlow features:
chatbot.featIphone:
⚡ Algorithm Priority simulates a video/photo from a real iPhone.

It injects authentic Apple metadata: device, iOS version, camera, GPS, signature. Video files are output in .mov format (like a real iPhone).

Platforms think the content comes from a real device.
chatbot.featPixel:
✨ Magic Pixel adds imperceptible noise to every pixel of every frame.

Visually identical, but the file hash is completely different. Duplicate detection algorithms see a unique file.
chatbot.featMetaTech:
🔧 Technical Metadata modifies video bitrate, GOP, FPS and H.264 profile.

These technical parameters make each copy unique at the codec level without any perceptible visual change.
chatbot.featComparator:
🔍 The Metadata Comparator analyzes two files and displays all their metadata side by side.

You can verify that your duplications are truly different from the original. Differences are highlighted in green with a similarity score.
chatbot.resolved: Great! Don't hesitate if you have more questions.

opt.aiPlatforms: Which platforms does it work with?

err.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
err.timeout: Timed out — the video is too long or the server is overloaded.

valid.cutEnd: Cut end must be ≥ start + 0.05 s.

help.tags: Enable each metadata field to inject individually. If no button is enabled, the original metadata is preserved.
help.visual:
Subtle (imperceptible) values
Saturation/Contrast/Gamma: 0.99 → 1.01 (neutral 1.0) • Brightness: −0.01 → +0.01 (neutral 0) • Hue: −0.05 → +0.05 • Vignette: 0 → 0.1 • Grain: 0 → 4 • k: −0.05 → +0.05 • Sharpening: 0 → 0.3.
help.motion: Speed (x) 0.98 → 1.02 (neutral 1.0) • Zoom 0.98 → 1.02 • Pixel shift 0 → 4 • Rotation −1 → +1 • FPS 24 → 30.
help.technical: Dimensions (W/H %) −10 → +10 • Border 0 → 40 • Video bitrate 8,000 → 12,000 • GOP 48 → 60 • Cut: to ≥ start + 0.05s.
help.audio: Volume −6 → +6 dB • EQ peak (f) 50 → 12000 Hz • Audio bitrate 96 → 256 kb/s (AAC).
help.options: Flip: vertical. Reverse: horizontal mirror. Location: country injected into the metadata. Algorithm priority: realistic iPhone metadata.
help.motionPro:
Camera moves over time. Each effect has a strength slider (subtle → strong), bounded to stay clean even at max.
Dynamic reframe: the frame glides • Progressive rotation: slight tilt • Progressive zoom: tightens / opens • Shake: micro handheld jitter.

badge.partialSuccess: {count} copy(ies) already succeeded — download them and redo only the missing ones.

legacy.packsNotePost: . The filters below apply on top.

audio.label: Audio
audio.hint: volume ±1 dB, slight frequency shift, audio bitrate

motion.label: Motion
motion.hint: speed ±1.5%, slight zoom, minimal rotation, pixel shift

visual.label: Visuals
visual.hint: eq (B/C/S), hue, soft unsharp, soft noise, vignette/lens

technical.label: Technical
technical.hint: video bitrate, GOP, H.264 profile/level, frame rate

det.platformNoticeBody1: This module strips all AI metadata — including the C2PA manifests used by Meta/Threads.
det.platformNoticeBody2: Some platforms also use one (pixels, patterns) that is independent of metadata.
det.platformNoticeBody3: To get around this layer, use the module to apply visual micro-variations.
det.howItWorksIntro2: that simulates a human photographic workflow:
det.step1Body: EXIF, XMP, IPTC, C2PA/JUMBF — all AI manifests erased.
det.step2Body: a light photo-capture simulation (lens blur → sensor noise → ISP sharpening → JPEG re-compression).
det.step3Body: a realistic camera, software, photographer, and consistent date.
det.limitExceeded: Limit exceeded — you selected {count} files, the maximum is {max}. Only the first {maxKept} were kept.
det.errorTimeout: Timed out — try again with fewer files.
det.resultSuccessSingular: {count} file processed — metadata erased and rewritten.
det.resultSuccessPlural: {count} files processed — metadata erased and rewritten.

img.errorNoResponse: The server did not respond. Please try again.
img.errorTimeout: Timed out — processing took too long.
